sql.query: SELECT w.id,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,w.status,w.startDate,w.targetDate,w.createdDate,wt.templateName,t.teamName,u.displayName AS ownerName,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT ws.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS stageCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ws.status='complete' THEN ws.id END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedStageCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT tk.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS taskCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tk.status='complete' THEN tk.id END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedTaskCount FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_templates wt ON wt.id=w.templateId AND wt.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams t ON t.id=w.ownerTeamId AND t.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=w.ownerUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.workflowId=w.id AND ws.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks tk ON tk.workflowId=w.id AND tk.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.tenantId=:tenantId GROUP BY w.id ORDER BY w.modifiedDate DESC,w.id DESC
